evals.name: tests-failure-summary
evals.prompt: I just ran our iOS test suite and it produced a result bundle at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`. Quick smoke check — did everything pass or were there failures? If there were failures, dump the test names and any failure messages so I can scan them.

evals.name: attachments-from-failures
evals.prompt: ok so one of our snapshot tests is doing something weird — I need the screenshots and any other attached debug files from just the failing tests. The xcresult is at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`. Pull only the failure attachments into `/tmp/peekie-eval-failed-attachments/` and tell me what landed there.

evals.name: warnings-by-type-count
evals.prompt: trying to figure out which kinds of compiler warnings our build is emitting — want a count grouped by warning type so we know what to prioritize fixing. The build bundle is at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`

evals.name: coverage-bare-number
evals.prompt: Whats the overall test coverage % for this xcresult, just give me the single number rounded to one decimal. Path: `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult`

evals.name: sonar-report-generation
evals.prompt: Need to upload test results to our SonarQube instance. We've got the xcresult at `Tests/PeekieTests/Resources/SPM-26.5-iOS.xcresult` and the test sources live under `Tests/`. Generate the sonar-compatible test report file and save it to `/tmp/peekie-eval-sonar.xml` so I can sonar-scanner it.
